ACKS-LOCATION.Title: ACKS II — Locations & Settlements
ACKS-LOCATION.browser.menuHint: Audit every imported table, export it as a Foundry document prefilled with the imported values, and drop a tweaked replacement back to override it (revert any time).
ACKS-LOCATION.browser.title: ACKS Imported Rules Tables
ACKS-LOCATION.browser.hint: Every table below was imported from your own books. Export creates a prefilled world document (a RollTable where the data rolls, a JSON journal page otherwise) — tweak it, then drag it onto the row to override the import. Revert falls back to the imported values.
ACKS-LOCATION.browser.empty: No tables imported yet — run the book table import first (acks-content).
ACKS-LOCATION.browser.revert: Remove override — fall back to the import
ACKS-LOCATION.browser.dropHint: Drop a RollTable or journal page here to replace this table
ACKS-LOCATION.tables.exportedFrom: Exported from imported ruledata table {key} (acks-location Ruledata Browser). Tweak entries, then drop this table onto its browser row to apply.
ACKS-LOCATION.tables.notRollable: This table is a grid — replace it with a JSON journal page, not a RollTable.
ACKS-LOCATION.tables.badDropType: Cannot read a {type} — drop a RollTable or a journal page.
ACKS-LOCATION.tables.placeholderHint: Placeholder — no import provided this expected table yet. Fill the JSON below, or drop a RollTable/journal page onto its Ruledata Browser row to supply it.
